overview: Sense PhotoEdit is a full-stack browser-based image editor that replicates the Adobe Photoshop experience. It features a pixel-perfect dark UI with toolbars, panels, canvas editing via Fabric.js, layer management, filters, undo/redo, and project save/load with user authentication.
features: Photoshop-style dark UI with top menu bar, left toolbar, and right panels
Fabric.js canvas with brush, eraser, text, shapes, move, and zoom tools
Layer management: add, delete, hide/show, and rename layers
Color picker with RGB sliders and gradient box
Image filters: grayscale, blur, brightness and contrast
Undo/Redo history for all canvas actions
Export canvas as PNG or JPG
Save and load projects from backend storage
